Class GeneralSettings

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.general.GeneralSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
public class GeneralSettings extends Object implements Settings
General settings cover all options related to documents in general.

Settings introduced by BoostedYAML follow builder design pattern, e.g. you may build your own settings using GeneralSettings.builder() //configure// .build()

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    GeneralSettings.Builder
    Builder for general settings.
    static enum 
    GeneralSettings.KeyFormat
    Key format for sections to use; specifies how the loaded/supplied keys should be formatted.

    MapSupplier
    getDefaultMapSupplier()
    Returns default map supplier to use to supply map instances during loading/creating new sections/when needed.

    Returns default number to use by Section getters if the return type is a number - integer, float, byte, biginteger...
